allow: Bash(pkill -f "next dev" 2>/dev/null; echo "Stopped existing dev servers")
Bash(taskkill /F /IM node.exe 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; rm -f .next/dev/lock 2>/dev/null; echo "Cleaned up processes and lock file")

Bash(sleep 5 && curl -s http://localhost:3000 > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "Server running on port 3000" || curl -s http://localhost:3001 > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "Server running on port 3001" || echo "Checking server status...")
Bash(echo "Testing connection" && plink -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa ubuntu@51.68.235.51 "echo 'Connected successfully' && hostname && whoami")
Bash(plink -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa ubuntu@51.68.235.51 "uname -a && cat /etc/os-release | grep -E 'NAME|VERSION' && df -h && free -h && uptime")
Bash(plink -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa ubuntu@51.68.235.51 "which docker && docker --version || echo 'Docker not installed'")
Bash(plink -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa ubuntu@51.68.235.51 "which docker-compose && docker-compose --version || echo 'Docker Compose not installed'")
Bash(plink -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa ubuntu@51.68.235.51 "sudo ufw status || sudo iptables -L -n | head -20")
Bash(plink -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa ubuntu@51.68.235.51 "netstat -tulpn | grep LISTEN || ss -tulpn | grep LISTEN")
